description_long: This chaise features a modern, geometric design with a rectangular seat surface and distinctive angular wooden legs. The seat is a flat, stone-like slab with a smooth, matte finish, accented by two large V-shaped wooden inlays at each end that extend down to form the legs. The legs are robust, forming a continuous frame that wraps around the corners and provides a sturdy base. The overall construction appears solid and heavy, with no visible backrest or armrests, emphasizing a minimalist aesthetic. The color palette consists of a cool gray for the seat and warm, natural wood tones for the legs and inlays. The surface is hard and likely made from engineered stone or concrete, paired with finished wood for structural support.
description: A modern chaise with a flat gray stone-like seat and angular wooden legs, featuring V-shaped wood inlays. The design is minimalist, sturdy, and visually striking.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the chaise, highlighting the V-shaped wooden inlays and the broad, flat seat surface.
description_view_1: Side view emphasizing the depth of the seat and the continuous wooden leg frame, with the V-shaped inlay visible at the near end.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, again showing the V-shaped wooden inlays and the overall symmetry of the design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, displaying the depth and the angular construction of the wooden legs.
attribute_backrest_design: There is no visible backrest on this chaise; the seat is flat and open on all sides, emphasizing a minimalist, bench-like form.
attribute_armrest_presence: No armrests are present; the sides are open and unobstructed.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are angular and geometric, constructed from light brown wood that forms a continuous frame wrapping around the corners. The design is modern and robust, with no decorative elements beyond the V-shaped inlays.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: There is no visible upholstery; the seat surface is a solid, smooth gray stone-like material with no pattern or texture beyond the natural finish.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: No cushions are present; the seat is a single, flat slab with no attached or loose cushions visible.
